title: GeoAndFriends
description: A Kitchen Sink (Mainly focused on Exploration) Modpack created for GeoTheNoodle/GeoDerp and his friends.
body:
## A Kitchen Sink Modpack focused on exploration,creation and a bit of immersion, whilst celebrating and enjoying Open Source (or open licensed) mods. 
*(ex. MIT,GPL,LGPL,MPL-2.0,Apache License 2.0)*  
**Note:** Sodium is now not opensourced and is still being used by this modpack
Designed to play with personal friends but made public for everyone's enjoyment. 

</br>
</br>

*Note: Please [notify me](https://github.com/GeoDerp/GeoAndFriends) if the licensing of one or more of these included mods doesn't not include permission for replication/modification. (I'll take it down)*

-----

## World Gen (Ignore after 1.20.1-1)

**This modpack includes Some recommendations for mods to manually add include:** - *(varying copyright)*


**'Traverse' and 'Terrestria'** (LGPL-3.0-only)
- [Traverse](https://modrinth.com/mod/traverse) - LGPL-3.0-only
- [Terrestria](https://modrinth.com/mod/terrestria) - LGPL-3.0-only
- [Cinderscapes](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/cinderscapes) - LGPL-3.0-only
- [Fabric Seasons: Terraformers Compat](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-seasons-terraformers-compat) - MPL-2.0


**Terra** (MIT)
- [Terra](https://modrinth.com/plugin/terra) - MIT


**Terralith:** (Custom License)
- [Terralith](https://modrinth.com/mod/terralith) - [Custom](https://github.com/Stardust-Labs-MC/Terralith/blob/main/license.txt)
- [Fabric Seasons: Terralith Compat](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-seasons-terralith-compat) - MPL-2.0
- [Treeplacer - Terralith Addon](https://modrinth.com/datapack/treeplacer-terralith-addon) - MIT
- [Treeplacer](https://modrinth.com/mod/treeplacer/version/1.0.1) - MIT
- [Tectonic](https://modrinth.com/datapack/tectonic) - MIT
- [Nullscape](https://modrinth.com/mod/nullscape) - [Custom License](https://github.com/Stardust-Labs-MC/license/blob/main/license.txt)
- [Amplified Nether](https://modrinth.com/mod/amplified-nether) - [Custom License](https://github.com/Stardust-Labs-MC/license/blob/main/license.txt)

**Oh The Biomes You'll Go:** (Multiple Licenses)
- [Oh The Biomes You'll Go](https://modrinth.com/mod/biomesyougo) - [Multiple ](https://github.com/AOCAWOL/BYG/blob/1.18.X/LICENSE.txt)
- [Fabric Seasons: BYG Compat](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-seasons-byg-compat) - MPL-2.0


*Other Ideas to add*
- [MVS - Moog's Voyager Structures](https://modrinth.com/mod/moogs-voyager-structures) - MIT
- [MES - Moog's End Structures  ](https://modrinth.com/mod/mes-moogs-end-structures) - LGPL-3.0-only
- [BetterEnd](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterend) - MIT
- [BetterNether](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/betternether) - MIT
- [Distant Horizons](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/distanthorizons) - LGPL-3.0-only *(May be slow or generate errors)*
- [Naturalist](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/naturalist) - [Custom License](https://github.com/starfish-studios/Naturalist/blob/1.19/LICENSE)
- [Create Slice & Dice](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/slice-and-dice) - [Custom License](https://github.com/PssbleTrngle/SliceAndDice/blob/1.19.x/LICENSE.txt)
---

## known Issues (1.19.2)

- Iris Shaders with geckolib  
Currently geckolib (used with mods Wondrous Wilds and Aphid Additions) does not currently have support for Iris shaders. (read more on this issue here: https://github.com/IrisShaders/Iris/issues/1878).   
From what I can tell, Iris shaders will still work, however without modifying the [shadow settings](https://github.com/IrisShaders/Iris/issues/1878#issuecomment-1509032671) on your shader you might find the animations, for those two mods,  have issues.
- Paladin's Furniture Mod - book
Paladin's Furniture Mod requires Patchouli to view its recipe book, however its an CC mod so im a little hesitant to add it to the pack

-----

## Special Thanks
A special thanks to all the beautiful people who have created these mods included in this pack
</br></br>
### For a list of all mods included and their Authors
**Please see:** [Version Dependencies](https://modrinth.com/modpack/geoandfriends/version/1.19.2-1)
